acceptance_targets: [chapter_09-F001] PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:423 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:496, Ada is not carrying a multi-exchange live conversation unless her canon availability is explicitly updated elsewhere; FAIL if Ada still delivers the same extended real-time coaching while continuity_sheet availability remains unchanged.

[chapter_09-F002] PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:524, there is at least one named-source consequence (not anonymous feed noise) plus Marisol's immediate action/reaction tied to that consequence; FAIL if the section remains primarily a generic social-media comment list.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:423 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:496, Ada is not carrying a multi-exchange live conversation unless her canon availability is explicitly updated elsewhere; FAIL if Ada still delivers the same extended real-time coaching while continuity_sheet availability remains unchanged.
findings.problem: Continuity contradiction: Ada has a multi-turn on-page intervention in this chapter even though canonical availability in outline/continuity_sheet.json places her on-page in chapters 01, 04, 05, 08, 10, 15, and 18. This creates a canon-state mismatch.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the support beat starting at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:423 and ending at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:496 so the real-time de-escalation call is handled by a chapter-09-available character (for example Luis), or defer Ada's live call to chapter_10 while keeping only a brief text here. Preserve the sobriety check and leverage warning function.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:524, there is at least one named-source consequence (not anonymous feed noise) plus Marisol's immediate action/reaction tied to that consequence; FAIL if the section remains primarily a generic social-media comment list.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift via summary replacing scene: at peak fallout pressure, the chapter moves into a generic comment chorus ("This is brave", "This is irresponsible", etc.) instead of staging one concrete social consequence with a named relationship or stakeholder. Tension diffuses into abstraction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace most of the montage starting at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 and ending at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:524 with one specific incoming message/call from a named person with actual leverage (family, sponsor, landlord, counsel, or donor-facing operator) and show Marisol's immediate embodied response and decision in-scene.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
